title: Nostalgic Gooey Australian Potato Stir-fry
description: An earthy and gooey dish featuring five spice powder and potatoes, perfect for a nostalgic meal.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Low-sodium soy sauce for a healthier option

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Lightly coat the pan to prevent sticking

instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Wash and cut potatoes into bite-sized chunks.
Slice broccoli florets and set aside. Mince garlic cloves finely for added flavor.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add chopped potatoes to the skillet with some salt (optional) and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until slightly charred on all sides.
Toss in broccoli florets and continue stir-frying for another 2-3 minutes, allowing vegetables to soften slightly but still retain their crunchiness.
Stir in five spice powder and soy sauce. Mix well to coat the veggies evenly.
Place the mixture into a baking dish, spreading it out evenly. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until potatoes are tender and golden brown on top.
Let it cool slightly before serving hot with steamed rice or noodles as a side.
